ratings.comment: Mehdi was a great teacher and he knew his stuff.   Sometimes he breezed through his lectures to focus on scientific papers which was nice to think about these in a manner that is required for higher education.  However sometimes his tests were hard to tell what would be on them.

One of the best professors I have had! Very passionate about Fungi and really does care about his students. I love how he helps students to dissect research papers - really helps if you plan to go on to graduate school! Overall just a very kind, friendly, and happy man. Loved having him!! I highly recommend!!
